ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Your account has been locked out. Please contact your administrator!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This message appears to inform the user the account is locked. Please contact the administrator to unlock the account.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Save/Update/Delete/Load Transaction data to/from template complete!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: //Save/Update/Delete Transaction to Template OK

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Your password is about to expire in $2$ days. Please contact your administrator!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This informs the user that the account/password will be expired. The system administrator may change the account/password in the System Security function.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The current message broker listener will stop right now!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: If you want to stop the message broker listener, please click the 'Yes' button, if not, please click the 'No' button.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The SWIFT message $1$ has been sent by other Transaction!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: The message has been sent by other transaction.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't Pick Out Any Record in Auto-Process.
ERRORCODE.ACTION: There is no records meet a query criterion in Auto-Process, please re-set the query criterion.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Archiving $1$ begins!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: It informs that archiving data begins

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Archiving data $2$ ends!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: It informs that archiving data is end

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Auto-Process of copy transaction $1$ complete!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: It informs that copy transaction is done successfully.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: This rate is involved in other transactions. It can't be deleted!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This rate is used in the transaction, so you can't delete it.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Sorry, There is a set of Swift Message that they have not been entirely received!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please wait.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The value of 27 tag is not valid
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please check the value of 27 tag to make sure this SWIFT message is correct please!

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Password successfully changed.
ERRORCODE.ACTION: It is informed that the relevant password is changed successfully.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Format successfully changed!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This is to inform the user that the date format has been successfully changed.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Auto-Process batch execute $1$ begins!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This the EE AP log just to inform the user that the Auto Process Batch task will begin

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Auto-Process batch execute $1$ complete!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This the EE AP log just to inform the user that the Auto Process Batch task ends here!

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: SWIFT Merge Log: get B1tag file $1$
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This is the EE AP log to inform the user the program will start to get the value stored in B1 tag

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Auto-Process batch execute $1$ begins!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This is the EE AP log to inform the user the Auto Process task start here!

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: This print type: $1$ is running?
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This is to inform the user that the print task is in the running mode

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: This print type: $1$ is stopped!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This is to inform the user that the print task is stopped

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: $1$ has been executed successfully!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This log indicate the user that the program had successfully run a particular task under batch manager function

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: This print type: $1$ is running?
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This is to inform the user that the print task is in running mode

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: SWIFT Merge Log: the B1tag value is $1$
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This is the EE AP log to inform the user the program will start to get the value stored in B1 tag

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Process message $1$ complete!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This is to inform the user EE had successfully processed the SWIFT message.

ERRORCODE.ACTION: No SWIFT details were found!

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: No message record in STP table!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: There is no SWIFT message stored in STP_IN_MSG_STO

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: No Invoice!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: There is no Invoice related to the current transaction.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: System is starting start of day!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: The system is start of day.

ERRORCODE.ACTION: This is to inform the user that SWIFT has been generated successfully.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Document has been generated in current transaction.
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This is to inform the user that document has been generated successfully.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Auto-Process batch execute $1$ complete!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Run Batch function end.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: LMTS is starting end of day!
LMTS is starting end of month!
LMTS is starting revaluation!
There is no record in the table !
ERRORCODE.ACTION: There is no record table!

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Batch is running!
MT$3$ RMA check for receiver [$2$] and sender [$1$] has failed. Would you like to override? Override may cause a failure of the message in SAA.
Another user has confirmed this transaction!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This information is to tell the user the transaction is confirmed by another clerk, the proper reason is the session for current user is timeout.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: There is no system parameter found for print setting.
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please check the print setting in the AP server through CS Utility.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: There is no attachment to be sent in initial transaction data downloading!
No catalog records!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This is mainly caused by lack of sub-task of a particular parent-task in batch manager function in CS Utility, please add relevant sub-tasks or generate XML for Batch Manager and try again!

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: SQL statements of voucher release transaction were invalid!
Can't generate header information of the SWIFT message!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Swift Header information exists in Header table but not exist in detail table, please check what happened or try again later!

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't generate the extension SWIFT message!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: The Start Tag is exists, But the End Tag does Not exist!

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: This message is not valid.
ERRORCODE.ACTION: It seems it does not have B3 and B4 tag, please check manually again

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The message size exceeds it's size limitation!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please check the message content to make sure the message size doesn't exceeds its size limitation, and retry again.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The element type and value are not associate!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please input the correct value to associate the element type.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The validation of this message failed.
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please check the message content.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't find the rate value between $1$ and $2$!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please check whether there is relevant setting in the rate table.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't get the document's index!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please check whether the document index inform is existed in the document index table.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: There is no receiving queue!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please check whether the relevant receive queue is valid.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: No documents for the function!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: It is informed that there is no document existed in that function.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: No document header!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please check whether there is relevant document header info existed.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Lock the transaction data failed!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please check the transaction record in the source table whether another user uses it.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Old password incorrect!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please go back and input the correct Old password.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: System is ending of day!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please run SOD function first!

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Invalid Password
ERRORCODE.ACTION: If you have changed the password please make sure the password you input match the new one

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The entry number is more than 30!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please check the entry number length.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: This document $1$ generates fail!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please check whether the relevant document index info is existed in the document index table.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Receiving GAPI response messages time out!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please check whether the receive queue is valid and then retry again.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Message broker $1$ reaches the maximum of retries to connect to the listening queue,Stopping Message Broker $2$
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This is to inform the user that the retry times had reached the maximum number allowed.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The transaction $1$ is locked!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This is to inform the user that the record involved in the task the user planning to start is locked

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The master table is NOT found in the component $1$
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the program could not get the master table of current transaction module.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Invalid request type!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the user had submitted an invalid request type, please be note that only the file type are supported by EE.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Demerge SWIFT message failed or current SWIFT message is an extension message!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This is to inform the user EE has failed in demerging SWIFT message, may the current SWIFT message is a extension message of another message.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Warning: Couldn't find the primary key. Please re-set the catalog!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This is a warning message, for the user had forgotten to select the key field when set the catalog.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't find the file: $1$
ERRORCODE.ACTION: The program could not find the apu_root.XML in AUTOPRO under AP side, please select apu_root.xml check box when generate XML for Auto Process tasks

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't get the response from the server when running End Of Day!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Unknown exceptions try again.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Please log off first!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please log off

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Please login first!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please login first

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The response is too short!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please enlarge the time out number when adding a new GAPI interface in CS Utility

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: There is no record in the detail table!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: No records were found in voucher table.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The component which will be invoked is empty!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please make sure some relevant components were added to the current function.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The error code $1$ was not defined!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the error code was not found.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The XML file of $1$ doesn't exist!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: The Unit Code XML does not exist under the following path BANK\CNTY\AP\SODEOD

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The document doesn't exist!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: The document the user inquires does not exist.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Sorry, there are sets of Swift message that have not been entirely received! Please wait!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This is to inform the user that the SWIFT message has not been entirely received

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The authorization level of current user is not enough for the transaction!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the current user hasn't been authorized to enough level for the current transaction.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't find the rule's information of $1$ .
ERRORCODE.ACTION: The authorization level rule is not valid for current unit

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The path for backup file doesn't exist!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: The program could not find the path for backup files, please set the path accordingly.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Warning: first date is later than second date!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: The second date should be later than the first date, please have check!

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Receiving messages time out!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Receive messages time out please try again.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Could not find the function $1$ which has been assigned to this message!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: The function which will invoke the incoming SWIFT message could not be found, please have a check.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't get the event times from table $1$ on condition that UNIT CODE= $2$ and MAIN REFERENCE = $3$ .
ERRORCODE.ACTION: The program could not get the event time value of the record that related to current transaction from the table.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't get the reference number named $1$ and unit code = $2$ .
ERRORCODE.ACTION: The program could not get the reference number value of the record that related to current transaction from the table.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: This message is not valid. Please check it manually!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: The message is not valid please check it manually

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Invalid path delimiter!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: 0 can't be used ad delimiter please have a check

ERRORCODE.ACTION: The XML format for the file that is involved in current transaction is not valid please generate again!

ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please have a check about the XML file and pay special attention to the workspace set in the XML file.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: No any available TFT client application, please check the the configuration of file $1$ .
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please have a check about the XML file and pay special attention to the TFT set in the XML file.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Invalid G/L!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please choose the right G/L type when setting vouchers in accounting rules in CS Utility

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Invalid Currency!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please choose the right currency type when setting vouchers in accounting rules in CS Utility

ERRORCODE.ACTION: There is no voucher generated for current transaction.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The voucher set name is null!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: There is no voucher name found for the current transaction.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Invalid voucher document!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: The voucher document is invalid please have a check.

ERRORCODE.ACTION: There is no records stored in STD_AC_NUMBER table.

ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the account number that will be used to generate voucher does not exist in the STD_AC_NUMBER table.

ERRORCODE.ACTION: The currency type of this account number does not exist in the currency table

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: For this account No: $1$ the currency is $2$ , but in DB it's $3$ !
ERRORCODE.ACTION: The currency type of this account number the user input in JSP does not match the currency type of that account number stored in DB.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The validation type of accounting rules is invalid!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the user had chosen an invalid validation DC type make sure currency and equal amount can't be chosen simultaneously.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The amount is negative in voucher check!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please be informed that the amount of the voucher is negative

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The document of element entry is null!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: There are no entries of the voucher document

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Invalid voucher entry content!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: The entries of the voucher document is invalid please have a check.

ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means there is no related records match the document the user wants to merge.

ERRORCODE.ACTION: The format of the document is invalid please change it accordingly

ERRORCODE.ACTION: The length is invalid it should between 1 and 63 bytes.

ERRORCODE.ACTION: The program could not get the main reference field in the master table of the current transaction.

ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please define the application control code so that files can be generated successfully

ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please be informed that the valid range of order should be 0-99.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: There is no Swift message related to current transaction!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the Swift message has been sent or there is no Swift message attached to a particular function

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The record $1$ has been LOCKED by another user!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This is to inform the user the record the user want to modify is locked by other users may be they are using these records.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't find the function ID!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Function Loader: FUNCID is null!

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The files named $1$ does not exist!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please check the parameter to confirm whether the relevant XML has been generated correctly.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: AutoProcess copy transaction $1$ failed and the status is $2$ .
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Run copy transaction failed, please check the status and then retry.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't get task manager name.
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please check the batch manager parameter setting in the AP server.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The path for receiving files does not exist!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please check whether the receive file path is valid.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The message broker parameter is invalid!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please check the message broke parameter setting through CS Utility.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't generate message ID!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please check the GAPI setting.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't find the module name in the XML file of current function!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please check whether the Module info is valid in print setting

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't get the form set name!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please check whether the Form Set Name is valid.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't do Start Of Day properly, please re-do it!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please add the correct attribute 'TrxSOD' to the the SOD function and generate relevant XML

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't find the table name used in catalog setting!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please have a check that you have specify the right table for catalog setting, if you have chosen the right table then please check the database to see whether the table name in the DB is the same as the table name used under catalog setting under CSUtility

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: There is no record in the table!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This message pops up in the following Scenario:Actually there is no records in the table or there is no records match the SQL statements or there is some something wrong with the catalog setting in CS Utility, may be there some fields are deleted from the table but it is still invoked in some catalog setting, so, please firstly check the EE Log about the SQL, and then check the catalog settings in CS Utility and make sure some key fields such as C_MAIN_REF, I_EVENT_TIME, C_UNIT_CODE had selected when setting catalog for a function, if all these settings are correct please have a check about DB

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't find the file named $1$ .
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This message reminds the user that the program can't find the file to be printed, please have a check to see whether the file exist or the file name is typed correctly

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The HTML file doesn't exist!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please check the HTML file that you want to print exist!

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The XML file named $1$ does not exist!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please check the parameter to confirm whether the relevant XML has been generated correctly.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The value of field $1$ can't be null, but this field can't be found in the JSP!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This message pops up when the program are seeking some data from a non-system field and this field does not allow Null value, so please input some value in the field where the pop up message says.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Some system errors occurred on AP server!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This may be caused by may reason, the most properly reason is the program can't get the reference number, perhaps the XML file is lost or the rules for generate reference No. is not valid

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The template of SWIFT message doesn't exist under parameter folder!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This message means the relevant XML file haven't been generated for the SWIFT message the user wants to send, please go to CS Utility and generator relevant SWIFT massage XML for the message you want to send

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The value of tag $1$ in message $2$ is null! [ $3$]
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the user forget to input the value to a mandatory tag field when he/she wants to send the SWIFT message, please input the correct value to the field this message refers to

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Field SW59 party ID must be present when 23B is SPRI, SSTD, or SPAY!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means when the user want to send a MT103 message and if the 'Bank Operation Code' field (Tag23B) is SPRI, SSTD or SPAY then TAG59 must appears in this SWIFT message

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The length of BIC Code $1$ is invalid!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please have a check about the B2 tag in the SWIFT message you plan to send, and make sure the format of B2 tag is valid

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The amount is invalid.
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please check the amount field in EE Transaction screen and make sure the amount format matches the one you set in CS Utility

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The Date length is invalid.
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please have a check about the date length in EE Transaction screen and make sure this length matches the length you set in SWIFT Template Tag checking under SWIFT Configuration function in CS Utility

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The Date format is invalid.
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the value of the tag which is a date type is not valid, for example the field of Issuing date, and it doesn't match the rules set in CS Utility may be the rule say the date type should be in the format of YY-MM-DD, but actually the date format of the value input by the user is YYYY-MM-DD, so please have a check of these fields.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The rows/columns are invalid!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the columns or the rows filled in a particular tag doesn't match the rules set for this tag in CS Utility. Please have check this tag.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The tag includes the characters $1$ .
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This message pops up when the program are validating the content of the tag and it found some conflict with the rules set for that tag in CS Utility, so please have a check about SWIFT Template Tag checking under SWIFT Configuration function in CS Utility

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The length of SWIFT message doesn't equal to the length set in Utility.
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the length of the SWIFT message the user wants to send doesn't match the length validation set in CS Utility, please have a check of both the SWIFT message as well as the SWIFT Configuration in CS Utility.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The message type named $1$ in B2 tag is invalid!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the B2 tag attached with the SWIFT message is invalid, please have a check about the SWIFT Message Tag mapping of B2 tag of the SWIFT message you want to send under SWIFT Configuration function in CS Utility

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The 27 Tag doesn't exist!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This message means the SWIFT message is lack of tag 27 when issuing a Documentary Credit, and this tag is a mandatory tag, please add this tag to MT700, and try again later.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: This SWIFT message is lacking of block $2$ !
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the SWIFT message that the user plans to send is lack of 'Application Header Block' part, please add this part to the message you want to send

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The program had failed in executing $1$ .
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This log indicate the user that the program had failed to run a particular task under batch manager function

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The table name is null!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This error message means that the table name is wrong or the user haven't choose a table when adding attribute to a function, please choose the right table when adding attributes to functions

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The Main Reference No. is Null!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the program has failed to get the main reference number.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't find the node value in the table layout XML file.
ERRORCODE.ACTION: The node name `COLUMN' does not exist in the metaDom.xml, please check it.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: There is no SQL generated for the Current transaction, so it will ignore current transaction's transfer to component
ERRORCODE.ACTION: The program can't execute the SQL statements for a particular transfer to rule, please have a check about the Transfer to rule setting in EE Utility

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't get the UNIT_CODE node's value!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the program could not find the unit code of the current user from session; session time out is the most possible reason for this problem

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't get the C_USER_ID node's value!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the program could not find the user ID of the current user from session; session time out is the most possible reason for this problem.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Data source is invalid!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the program could not find the Database name

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't get the UserTryTimes node's value!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the program could not find the try times of the current user from session; session time out is the most possible reason for this problem.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Password is invalid!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Input a correct Password and try again.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The transaction reference no doesn't exist!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This was caused by lacking transaction reference No.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The table named $1$ can't be found!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the user has forgotten to generate the table layout XML please go to CS Utility and generate table structure XML.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The field named $1$ doesn't exist!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means in the transfer to rule setting the field mapping failed! Please have a check about the field mapping in transfer to rule.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The table layout XML file of the table $1$ doesn't exist!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This error was caused by lacking of table layout XML, please go to CS Utility to generate related table layout XML using table structure option under AP server tab

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The primary key field named $1$ can't be null!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the user haven't assign any values to the key fields in the target table when the transfer to rule was used to insert some records to the target table.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The operator is invalid!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the user had used a wrong operator when setting a new transfer to rule.make sure the operator used in the transfer to rule obey the mathematical logic

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't find the JS file under this path $1$ .
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the program can't find the Server Side JS that was related to the function, please go CS Utility to generate Server Side JS XML of the function.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Process message $1$ failed. Please refer to the error message $2$.
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This error message is to inform the user EE had failed to process the SWIFT message due to unknown exception, please try again later.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Transfer to failed for the value of field $1$ in where condition is null!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This error means no value was assigned to the field which was used in the SQL where condition. Please have a check about fields that were used in the SQL where condition

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't get the module name!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: The program could not find the module name under in XML file.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Get function ID from table $1$ failed!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: The relevant function ID does not exist in the LedgerTable.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Field $1$ is a primary key of table $2$ ,it must be added into catalog setting!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the field acts as a primary key of that table, and it must be selected and added into the catalog.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Function type is invalid!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Invalid function type was encounter while doing transaction

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Check type is invalid!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please be inform that the Traveler Cheque type should be either AmEx or Thomas Cook

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Cash or Check type is invalid!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This error was caused by either invalid cash type or cheque type. Please have a check.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Transaction type is invalid!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please be informed that the transaction type should be 'Sale Cash'. Please have a check.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The value of C_EVENT_STATUS is null!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the program could not find the transaction status of current transaction. Please have a check about the C_EVENT_STATUS in the ledger table.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The field's name can't be null!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please select some fields for the SQL.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't get table name!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means no table was selected for the function

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't get event table name!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means no event table was selected for the function

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't get the primary keys!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Lost of Primary Keys please check the table structure!

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: There is no context in the End Of Day answer file!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please have a check the filed listed in BANK\CNTY\AP\TCPIP\ tcp_root.xml

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Document file is null.
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Unknown exception

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The table contains no record.
ERRORCODE.ACTION: There is no records stored in the component table

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Invalid SQL statement was generated!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the SQL was not correct. Please have a check about the catalog setting

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The field name is null!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: No fields were used when generating document. Please add necessary fields in form function in CS Utility

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: File named $1$ does not exist!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: The document related to the current transaction does not exist in the TRXDATA folder.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The length of field $1$ is more than field $2$.
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the length of the value input in the fields has exceed the field's maximum length

ERRORCODE.ACTION: The reason of this error is no response Message or no receive Queue!

ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the program could not get the primary key of the table involved in current transaction.

ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the program could not find the XML file involved in current transaction in the folder BANK\CNTY\AP\FAX

ERRORCODE.ACTION: The system could not receive the acknowledgement message within the time limited. Try again please.

ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the merva is null, please set it in SWIFT function in CS Utility.

ERRORCODE.ACTION: Two users cannot modify same records at the same time, one user need to log off first.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: SQL Sever error $1$
ERRORCODE.ACTION: System detects error on executing SQL statement, and gets the error message from the DB server. Please check the database environment, or get help form the DBA.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The XML file for $1$ doesn't existed under this path $2$
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please check the parameter to confirm whether the relevant XML has been generated correctly.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Restore action failed
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Restoring action is failed. Please retry again.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Archiving action failed!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please check whether the database structure between source and archiving is same.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The unit code is invalid please have a check!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please input the correct Business Unit Code.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: C_FUNGRP_ID NULL
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please check whether there are function groups assigned to the relevant Business Unit.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: com.cs.eximap.ejb. essa.RMICommunicatorProcess null
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please refer to the EE log to see which class caused this problem and contact CS Utility consultant to solve this problem

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't find the original user's information!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the program could not get the original user's information when assign user to user.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Generating SWIFT message failed.
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Swift content template does not exist under parameter folder

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: These related extension messages are invalid!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please check whether there are some of them have the same value of 27 tag, check them please!

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't demerge the message to the specified function
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please check the module name for this message, maybe there is no any function assigned to this message!

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Process printing document for multi-pages failed!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: No find the eight in main table when process document Multi page printing.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Session is null!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the session is emptied by the program on web server, the most properly reason for this information is the session is timeout. Please re-login.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Error 404—Not Found, From RFC 2068 Hypertext Transfer Protocol – HTTP/1.1:10.4.5 404 Not Found
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please make sure the name of the JSP appeared in the Func_fxxxxxxxx.XML under FUNC folder exist in the SCRN folder, and this SCRN folder is in the EAR package when the user deployed the application on weblogic

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Delete pending action failed!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please have a check about the catalog setting of delete pending function in CS Utility pay specially attention to the Catalog JSP, it should be 'DeleteCatalog.jsp' , and the main program of the function should be 'Trx. Delete Pending'

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: CatalogList tag could not write to JSP out
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This message tells the user the EE transaction page can't load the fields set in catalog setting function in EE Utility, please checking the catalog settings in Utility

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Voucher entries could not write to JSP out!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This message means that the parameters needs to be message into voucher are not string type and the message failed to covert it into string type and can't display these non-string type contents to Java script Page.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Please set the function JSP in utility!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please go to CS Utility to attach the right JSP to the function which throw this error message

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: MAINFORM. $1$ is null or not an object!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the JSP in lack of that field please contact CS consultant to add the field according to business Logic

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: JSP and Catalog are both null!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This error is due to missing JSP and catalog setting. Please attach the proper JSP file to the inquire function and set the catalog according to business Logic

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The value of $1$ tag in $2$ is null
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means some necessary inform is missing for a mandatory tag in the SWIFT message the user planning to send

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Unexpected exception in com.cs.eximap.ejb.dao.ASEExecuteToDataBaseBean.executeBatch()
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This error is mainly caused by lacking field in table, for example, when user click confirm button after finishing doing a add transaction the program will add some values to some fields, may be in the DB there is no field will receive the value, please refer to EE log to see which is the missing field.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: MQJE001：complete code $2$,reason 2059
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means there is something working with the queue the function currently deals with. Please have a check about the Queue under Queue Manager function in CS Utility and make sure all the related parameters are correctly set, e.g. host name, Queue Manager name, Queue name and so on.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Changing format failed!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This is to tell the user that the changing format action failed, please try again!

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't get the information of current business unit!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: The most possibly reason for this problem is that the user had forgotten to select the C_UNIT_CODE field when doing catalog parameter setting, please have a check about the catalog setting in CS Utility

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't find Sub-Task in the XML file!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This is mainly caused by lack of sub-task of a particular parent-task in batch manager function in CS Utility, please add relevant sub-tasks or generate XML for Batch Manager and try again!

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The value of tag $1$ in MT $2$ exceeds its limited length!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the length of the text that the user input in the tag has exceed the max length of that tag, so please shorten the text length.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Transfer to Error: the value of field $1$ in condition is null
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means there is no relevant record match the transfer to rule in the target table, e.g. the user had set a transfer to rule to update one particular record in XXX_ledger but actually, there is no record in that table which match the 'where condition'

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Document returning from XML file failed!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This is to inform the user the program of AP side could not get the document content from XML file in Web side.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't find the JSP for current transaction!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This error was caused by missing screen JSP of the function. Please add relevant JSP to that function

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: User's business unit information is null in XML file!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This indicates that the program was not able to get the Business Unit info that the current user assigned to.

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: Can't find the XML file under this path $1$
ERRORCODE.ACTION: Please make sure the 'EEAbout.xml' is in the version folder

ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The SQL condition is invalid!
ERRORCODE.ACTION: This means the condition that used to check the balance of vouchers is incorrect! Please check it!

ERRORCODE.ACTION: The function can't be found in the function's XML file.
